progress_log.note: Phase 6.1 shipped — src/symbol/ provider lifted; query.rs and edit.rs moved.
Phase 6.2 shipped — src/fs/ provider exists, path_helpers.rs deleted.
Phase 6.3 decision: won't lift text/ at this scale; documented in tracker §6.3.
Phase 6.4 closed-as-deferred — large tool files are blocked on ToolContext redesign. Tracker §6.4 marked won't-do at this scale; reopen after ToolContext lift.
